name: Court of Public Opinion
description:
Jenny, your classmate, accuses you of looking up her skirt, trying to convince all the students nearby that you are a stalker. Her friends insist that you sexually harass girls all the time: Jenny and her friends plead to everyone nearby to tell the teacher to expel you from school.

Jenny cries loudly, saying she will never feel safe at school as long as you also are attending as well. The only way the school can be made safe again is through your expulsion.

The students are confused, cuz they don't know you very well. But don't worry, Jenny's friends are here to educate these students about what a horrible person you are.

The Court of Public Opinion is now in session. How does the defendant plead?
creator: VRCat
